name: Savory Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole dish, cook the thinly sliced carrots and chopped onion with 1 tablespoon water on high power for 2 minutes.
2. Stir in the ground beef until partially cooked.
3. Cook uncovered on high power for an additional 3 minutes, stirring once to break up the meat.
4. Remove any remaining fat.
5. Stir in tomato sauce, remaining 1/2 cup water, dry red wine, sugar, salt, garlic powder, and pepper.
6. Continue cooking uncovered on high power until heated through and vegetables are tender (about 4-5 more minutes).
7. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese and serve.
